description: Discover the joy of festive baking with our enticing eggnog recipes! Perfect for Christmas celebrations, these dishes will add a touch of magic to your holiday table. From rich and creamy eggnog drinks to moist and fluffy eggnog cakes, our recipes are sure to delight your taste buds. Each recipe is easy to follow, featuring common ingredients like egg, milk, sugar, and vanilla. Celebrate National Eggnog Day or any festive occasion with these delightful concoctions. Plus, our food and beverage gallery offers a visual feast, helping you choose the perfect eggnog recipe for your Christmas or Xmas event. So, grab a cup, spoon, and start your culinary adventure in the comfort of your e-commerce platform today.
short_description: Explore our enticing eggnog recipes perfect for Christmas celebrations. From creamy drinks to fluffy cakes, delight your taste buds with our easy-to-follow recipes. Celebrate National Eggnog Day with these festive dishes. Browse our food and beverage gallery on your e-commerce platform today.

designer.description: My name is Darko Kosanin. I like to turn ideas into something visible. I feel great pleasure when I create something new, using various shapes and combinations of colors, fonts and elements into a new and original design. I am also a web developer, so I turn the design into codes with the same pleasure.

html_data:
Eggnog Day

 
 

EGGNOG INGREDIENTS

 
 
3 1/2 cup milk
1 1/2 teaspoons pure vanilla extract
1 teaspoon ground cinnamon
1 cinnamon stick
generous pinch of ground clove
6 eggs yolks
1 cup rum (optional)
1 cup heavy cream
3/4 granulated sugar
1/4 teaspoon nutmeg
 
 
 

RECEPIES

 
 

Over low heat combine milk, vanilla extract, cinnamon, cinnamon stick and clove in a medium saucepan. Rise the heat slowly and bring to a slow boil (it takes about 7 minutes to bring to a boil.) Once the milk mixture starts to boil take off heat and let the cinnamon stick seep for 2 minutes, remove cinnamon stick.
